schema.appDescription: Extract base price from GST-inclusive amount. Calculate original price before GST for any tax slab — 5%, 12%, 18%, or 28%.

howToSteps.name: Enter your details
howToSteps.text: Fill in the input fields for the Reverse GST Calculator. All inputs have smart defaults.

howToSteps.name: View instant results
howToSteps.text: Results update in real time as you type — no submit button needed.

howToSteps.name: Explore breakdown
howToSteps.text: Open the year-by-year breakdown table to see how your numbers change over time.

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust the inputs to compare different scenarios and find the best option for your situation.

faq.q: How do I extract base price from a GST-inclusive amount?
faq.a: Formula: Base Price = GST-Inclusive Amount ÷ (1 + GST Rate). Example: ₹11,800 at 18% GST → Base = 11800 ÷ 1.18 = ₹10,000. GST = ₹1,800.

faq.q: When is reverse GST calculation needed?
faq.a: Reverse calculation is needed when you receive an invoice with a GST-inclusive price and need to know the base amount for accounting, input tax credit (ITC) claims, or price comparison.

faq.q: Can I claim input tax credit on all purchases?
faq.a: Input tax credit (ITC) is available on GST paid for business purchases used for taxable supplies. ITC cannot be claimed on personal use, blocked credits (like cars for personal use), and exempt supplies.

faq.q: Is the Reverse GST Calculator free?
faq.a: Yes, the Reverse GST Calculator on CalcPhi is completely free with no registration required.
No. All calculations run in your browser. We do not store any financial data.

faq.q: Can I use the Reverse GST Calculator on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. CalcPhi is fully mobile-optimised and works on all modern smartphones.

examples.heading: Software subscription at ₹23,600 (including 18% GST)
examples.text: ₹23,600 inclusive of 18% GST: Base = 23600 ÷ 1.18 = ₹20,000. GST = ₹3,600 (CGST ₹1,800 + SGST ₹1,800). If used for business, you can claim ITC of ₹3,600.

examples.heading: Hotel bill ₹14,000 inclusive of 12% GST
examples.text: ₹14,000 at 12% GST: Base = 14000 ÷ 1.12 = ₹12,500. GST = ₹1,500. Hotels with tariff below ₹7,500 are taxed at 12%; above ₹7,500 at 18%.
